title: Team Tracker Website Development
description: Build a team tracker website using GenAI technology.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Team Tracker Website Development (DEM-2026-0078)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to develop a team tracker website leveraging GenAI technology to enhance collaboration and productivity. It aligns with our digital transformation goals in the Customer Digital domain.

Business Value  
The website will improve team transparency and streamline task management, leading to faster project completion and increased customer satisfaction. Enhanced tracking capabilities will support data-driven decision making.

Risk Mitigation  
To address medium risk, we will implement thorough testing and phased deployment to ensure stability and user adoption. Continuous monitoring and feedback loops will help promptly resolve any emerging issues.
capacity_reasoning: Delivery team has 36% overall available capacity.
